Description.SourceString:
I am lost in these treacherous ruins, with all hope of the outside world lost to me. I sought to escape the horror of Fellhollow, but this place is worse. Rotting from within. 

Yet, as I wither… as these bonds of flesh are broken, another world reveals itself. 

Walkways, doorways, entire new paths to travel. This prison is filled with ways to run that were not there before. 

Still, as I explore them, I feel her gaze upon me. I feel her hunger grow. Imaru is watching, and there is no escape. 

Saradomin have mercy, because Imaru most certainly will not.
